item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "root='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B'
printf 'FILES\\n'
find \""'$root" -type f -print | sort
printf '"'CONFIG\\n'
nl -ba \""'$root/config/policy.json"
printf '"'DOC\\n'
nl -ba \""'$root/docs/policy.md"
printf '"'ABSENCE_AND_ENCODING\\n'
if rg -n -i 'strict|production' \""'$root/config/policy.json" "$root/docs/policy.md"; then exit 1; else printf '"'strict_or_production_matches=0\\n'; fi
if rg -n '[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{10,13}' \""'$root/config/policy.json" "$root/docs/policy.md"; then exit 1; else printf '"'timestamp_matches=0\\n'; fi
for file in \""'$root/config/policy.json" "$root/docs/policy.md"; do iconv -f UTF-8 -t UTF-8 "$file" >/dev/null; done
printf '"'utf8_files=2\\n'"
